name: Creeta-creet
description: Creet - Skill navigator for Claude Code. Scans Skills, MCP tools, and LSP servers from all installed plugins and recommends the best match for your task.

plugins.name: creet
plugins.description: Skill navigator for Claude Code. Scans all installed plugins (Skills, MCP tools, LSP servers), recommends the best match for your task in 8 languages, and executes it. Type /c to start.
